name: HyperMPNN
description: Retrained ProteinMPNN on hyperthermophiles to recover their unique amino acid composition. Tested approach on a protein nanoparticle with a melting temperature of 65 degrees resulted in designs remaining stable at 95 degrees.
capabilities: Retrained ProteinMPNN on hyperthermophiles to recover their unique amino acid composition
Tested approach on a protein nanoparticle with a melting temperature of 65 degrees resulted in designs remaining stable at 95 degrees

pdbFile.description: Protein structure in PDB format for thermostable sequence design

designedResidues.description: Specific residues to design. If not set, all residues are designed.
